name: mean-authentication-system
description: Plataforma de login e cadastro com verificação do tipo OTP
author: Inaros Lemuel <infromke@gmail.com>

scripts.install-all: npm install && concurrently "npm install --prefix frontend" "npm install --prefix backend"
scripts.dev: concurrently --prefix "[{time}] [{name}] |" --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "green.bold,magenta.bold" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
